```{r ATAC-enhancer-induced-genes-cluster-matched}
    this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(induced.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                   enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                   cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
    induced.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(induced.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_atac[induced.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ATACseq_enhancers_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.atac <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "ATACseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_atac_enhancer))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.enhancer$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
## Other Heatmaps of ATACseq
```{r ATAC-promoter-heatmap-DEgenes-CPM-kegg-rowClustered-kmm-hclust-1, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/myEnvironment_7kmm-hc_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))
# 1. center and scale data
logCPM <- log2(CPM_atac_DEG_promoter + 1)

# 2. hierarchically cluster K-means clusters
# perform k-means-clustering to determine k_row.
#df <- logCPM
#wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
#for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
#lot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares") 

# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- niceKmeans(logCPM, 5)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[4]))
km_res.atac.promoter <- km_res
split_instructions.atac.promoter <- split_instructions
```
```{r ATAC-promoter-heatmap-DEgenes-CPM-kegg-rowClustered-kmm-hclust-2}
draw_atac_promoter_heatmap <- function(g) {# 4. load peaks of interest
  peaks <- link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene %in% g),] %>% dplyr::pull(promoter) %>% unique
  zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.atac.promoter$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_atac_DEG_promoter)]
  zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% peaks)
  row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg))
  row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]
  
  # 5. plot heatmap
  column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
    condition = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
    celltype = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
    col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
               celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))
  row_ha = rowAnnotation(
    foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                    labels = row_anno_label,
                    which="row",
                    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=3),
                    padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))
  #pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_7kmm-hc.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
  heatmap.atac.promoter <- Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                                   name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                   top_annotation = column_ha,
                                   right_annotation = row_ha,
                                   column_title = "ATACseq heatmap of promoters",
                                   cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                   cluster_rows = FALSE,
                                   column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                   row_split = split_instructions.atac.promoter, 
                                   show_row_names = FALSE,
                                   row_title_rot = 0,
                                   column_names_rot = 45,
                                   row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                   border = FALSE,
                                   column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                   column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                   row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
  #dev.off()
  return(heatmap.atac.promoter)
  
  # clean-up
  rm(logCPM, df, wss, km_res, split_instructions, zlogCPM.heatmap, zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg, row_anno_index, row_anno_label, column_ha, row_ha)
}

```
```{r ATAC-enhancer-heatmap-DEgenes-CPM-kegg-rowClustered-kmm-hclust-1, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# 1. center and scale data
zlogCPM <- log2(CPM_atac_DEG_enhancer + 1)

# 2. hierarchically cluster K-means clusters
# perform k-means-clustering to determine k_row.
#df <- logCPM
#wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
#for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
#plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares") 

# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- niceKmeans(zlogCPM, 5)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[4]))
km_res.atac.enhancer <- km_res
split_instructions.atac.enhancer <- split_instructions
```
```{r ATAC-enhancer-heatmap-DEgenes-CPM-kegg-rowClustered-kmm-hclust-2}
draw_atac_enhancer_heatmap <- function(glst){
  # 4. load peaks of interest
  peaks <- link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene %in% glst),] %>% pull(enhancer) %>% unique
  zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.atac.enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_atac_DEG_enhancer)]
  zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% peaks)
  row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg))
  row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]
  
  # 5. plot heatmap
  column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
    condition = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
    celltype = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
    col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
               celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))
  row_ha = rowAnnotation(
    foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                    labels = row_anno_label,
                    which="row",
                    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=3),
                    padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))
  #pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_7kmm-hc.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
  heatmap.atac.enhancer <- Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                                   name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                   top_annotation = column_ha,
                                   right_annotation = row_ha,
                                   column_title = "ATACseq heatmap of enhancers",
                                   cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                   cluster_rows = FALSE,
                                   column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                   row_split = split_instructions.atac.enhancer, 
                                   show_row_names = FALSE,
                                   row_title_rot = 0,
                                   column_names_rot = 45,
                                   row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                   border = FALSE,
                                   column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                   column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                   row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
  #dev.off()
  return(heatmap.atac.enhancer)
  
  # clean-up
  rm(logCPM, df, wss, km_res, split_instructions, zlogCPM.heatmap, zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg, row_anno_index, row_anno_label, column_ha, row_ha)
}
```
## Heatmaps of ChIPseq-promoter
```{r ChIP-promoter-all-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/myEnvironment_7kmm-hc_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[which(rownames(CPM_chip) %in% link_gene_promoter$promoter),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_chip_promoter <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_chip_promoter <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_promoter$clustered)-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_chip_promoter <- km_res_chip_promoter$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ChIPseq_promoters_all-genes.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_chip_promoter, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_chip_promoter, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIPseq-promoter-induced-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/myEnvironment_7kmm-hc_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)
induced.genes.promoters <- link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene %in% induced.genes),"promoter"]
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[which(rownames(CPM_chip) %in% induced.genes.promoters$promoter),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_chip_promoter <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_chip_promoter <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_promoter$clustered)-km_res_chip_promoter$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_chip_promoter <- km_res_chip_promoter$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_chipseq_promoters_induced-genes_5kmm.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_chip_promoter, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_chip_promoter, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIPseq-promoter-induced-genes-cluster-matched}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/myEnvironment_7kmm-hc_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch promoters of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)
induced.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                    cluster=split_instructions.rna) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_promoter$gene)
induced.genes.and.promoter <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.cluster)) {
  this.promoter <- unique(link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"promoter"])
  this.promoter.cluster <- induced.genes.cluster[which(induced.genes.cluster$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.promoter.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(induced.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.promoter)),
                                   promoter=this.promoter,
                                   cluster=rep(this.promoter.cluster,length(this.promoter)))
    induced.genes.and.promoter <- rbind(induced.genes.and.promoter, this.promoter.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_chip[induced.genes.and.promoter$promoter,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ChIPseq_promoters_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.chip <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all promoters in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_promoter))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.promoter$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
## Heatmaps of ChIPseq-enhancer
```{r ChIPseq-enhancer-all-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/myEnvironment_7kmm-hc_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[which(rownames(CPM_chip) %in% link_gene_enhancer$enhancer),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_chip_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_chip_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_chip_enhancer <- km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ChIPseq_enhancers_all-genes.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "H3K27ac ChIPseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_chip_enhancer, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIPseq-enhancer-induced-genes-general-dynamics}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/myEnvironment_7kmm-hc_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)
induced.genes.enhancers <- link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene %in% induced.genes),"enhancer"]
this.cpm <- CPM_chip[which(rownames(CPM_chip) %in% induced.genes.enhancers$enhancer),]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)

# pick 5 clusters
df <- this.logCPM
wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares")
rm(df,wss)

# niceKmeans
km_res_chip_enhancer <- niceKmeans(this.logCPM, 5)
split_instructions_chip_enhancer <- c(rep(1,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered)-km_res_chip_enhancer$breaks[4]))
zlogCPM_chip_enhancer <- km_res_chip_enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(this.logCPM)]

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ChIPseq_enhancers_induced-genes_5kmm.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions_chip_enhancer, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
```{r ChIPseq-enhancer-induced-genes-cluster-matched}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
load(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/myEnvironment_7kmm-hc_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))

# fetch enhancers of all genes and scale
induced.genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)
induced.genes.cluster <- data.frame(gene=induced.genes,
                                    cluster=split_instructions.rna) %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene %in% link_gene_enhancer$gene)
induced.genes.and.enhancer <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(induced.genes.cluster)) {
  this.enhancer <- unique(link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"enhancer"])
  this.enhancer.cluster <- induced.genes.cluster[which(induced.genes.cluster$gene==induced.genes.cluster$gene[i]),"cluster"]
    this.enhancer.df <- data.frame(gene=rep(induced.genes.cluster$gene[i],length(this.enhancer)),
                                   enhancer=this.enhancer,
                                   cluster=rep(this.enhancer.cluster,length(this.enhancer)))
    induced.genes.and.enhancer <- rbind(induced.genes.and.enhancer, this.enhancer.df)
}

this.cpm <- CPM_chip[induced.genes.and.enhancer$enhancer,]
this.logCPM <- log2(this.cpm + 1)
this.zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(this.logCPM)))

# heatmap
pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_cRE/heatmap_ChIPseq_enhancers_induced-genes_gene-cluster-matched.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(this.zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

heatmap.chip <- draw(Heatmap(this.zlogCPM, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            column_title = "chipseq signal of all enhancers in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_PBS",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("KRT_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("MEL_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer)[grepl("FRB_IFN",colnames(zlogCPM_chip_enhancer))]))),
                            row_split = induced.genes.and.enhancer$cluster, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(1, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()

```
## Other Heatmaps of ChIPseq
```{r ChIP-promoter-heatmap-DEgenes-CPM-kegg-rowClustered-kmm-hclust-1, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# 1. center and scale data
logCPM <- log2(CPM_chip_DEG_promoter + 1)

# 2. hierarchially cluster K-means clusters
# perform k-means-clustering to determine k_row.
#df <- logCPM
#wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
#for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
#plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares") 

# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- niceKmeans(logCPM, 5)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[4]))
km_res.chip.promoter <- km_res
split_instructions.chip.promoter <- split_instructions
```
```{r ChIP-promoter-heatmap-DEgenes-CPM-kegg-rowClustered-kmm-hclust-2}
draw_chip_promoter_heatmap <- function(g){
  # 4. load peaks of interest
  peaks <- link_gene_promoter[which(link_gene_promoter$gene %in% g),] %>% pull(promoter) %>% unique
  zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.chip.promoter$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_chip_DEG_promoter)]
  zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% peaks)
  row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg))
  row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]
  
  # 5. plot heatmap
  column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
    condition = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
    celltype = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
    col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
               celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))
  row_ha = rowAnnotation(
    foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                    labels = row_anno_label,
                    which="row",
                    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=3),
                    padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))
  #pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_7kmm-hc.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
  heatmap.chip.promoter <- Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                                   name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                   top_annotation = column_ha,
                                   right_annotation = row_ha,
                                   column_title = "H3K27ac ChIPseq heatmap of promoters",
                                   cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                   cluster_rows = FALSE,
                                   column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                   row_split = split_instructions.chip.promoter, 
                                   show_row_names = FALSE,
                                   row_title_rot = 0,
                                   column_names_rot = 45,
                                   row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                   border = FALSE,
                                   column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                   column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                   row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
  #dev.off()
  return(heatmap.chip.promoter)
  
  # clean-up
  rm(logCPM, df, wss, km_res, split_instructions, zlogCPM.heatmap, zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg, row_anno_index, row_anno_label, column_ha, row_ha)
}
```
```{r chip-enhancer-heatmap-DEgenes-CPM-kegg-rowClustered-kmm-hclust-1, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# 1. center and scale data
logCPM <- log2(CPM_chip_DEG_enhancer + 1)

# 2. hierarchially cluster K-means clusters
# perform k-means-clustering to determine k_row.
#df <- logCPM
#wss <- (nrow(scale(df))-1)*sum(apply(scale(df),2,var))
#for (i in 2:20) wss[i] <- sum(kmeans(scale(df),centers=i)$withinss)
#plot(1:20, wss, type="b", xlab="Number of Clusters", ylab="Within groups sum of squares") 

# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- niceKmeans(logCPM, 5)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[4]))
km_res.chip.enhancer <- km_res
split_instructions.chip.enhancer <- split_instructions
```
```{r chip-enhancer-heatmap-DEgenes-CPM-kegg-rowClustered-kmm-hclust-2}
draw_chip_enhancer_heatmap <- function(g){
  # 4. load peaks of interest
  peaks <- link_gene_enhancer[which(link_gene_enhancer$gene %in% g),] %>% pull(enhancer) %>% unique
  zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.chip.enhancer$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_chip_DEG_enhancer)]
  zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% peaks)
  row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg))
  row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]
  
  # 5. plot heatmap
  column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
    condition = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
    celltype = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
      lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
    col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
               celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))
  row_ha = rowAnnotation(
    foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                    labels = row_anno_label,
                    which="row",
                    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=3),
                    padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))
  #pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_7kmm-hc.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
  heatmap.chip.enhancer <- Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                                   name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                   top_annotation = column_ha,
                                   right_annotation = row_ha,
                                   column_title = "chipseq heatmap of enhancers",
                                   cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                   cluster_rows = FALSE,
                                   column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                   row_split = split_instructions.chip.enhancer, 
                                   show_row_names = FALSE,
                                   row_title_rot = 0,
                                   column_names_rot = 45,
                                   row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                   border = FALSE,
                                   column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                   column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                   row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
  #dev.off()
  return(heatmap.chip.enhancer)
  
  # clean-up
  rm(logCPM, df, wss, km_res, split_instructions, zlogCPM.heatmap, zlogCPM.heatmap_with_peaks_kegg, row_anno_index, row_anno_label, column_ha, row_ha)
}
```

# plot heatmaps Round Two
## Refined clustering of round one RNAseq heatmap
```{r rna-heatmap-round2-avgCPM10-log2FC1.5}
Dir="~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/integrative_analysis"
setwd(Dir)
library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(tidyverse)
library(gplots)
library(ggfortify)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(cowplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)

pbs_cols <- colnames(CPM_rna)[which(grepl("PBS",colnames(CPM_rna)))]
ifn_cols <- colnames(CPM_rna)[which(grepl("IFN",colnames(CPM_rna)))]
rows_above_CPM_cutoff_PBS <- rownames(CPM_rna[rowMeans(CPM_rna[,pbs_cols]) >= 10,]) %>% unlist()
rows_above_CPM_cutoff_IFN <- rownames(CPM_rna[rowMeans(CPM_rna[,ifn_cols]) >= 10,]) %>% unlist()
selected_rows <- unique(c(rows_above_CPM_cutoff_PBS,rows_above_CPM_cutoff_IFN))
CPM_rna_new <- CPM_rna %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% selected_rows)

DEG <- unique(c(rna.res.krt[which(rna.res.krt$padj<0.05 & (rna.res.krt$log2FoldChange)>1.5),"gene"],
                rna.res.mel[which(rna.res.mel$padj<0.05 & (rna.res.mel$log2FoldChange)>1.5),"gene"],
                rna.res.frb[which(rna.res.frb$padj<0.05 & (rna.res.frb$log2FoldChange)>1.5),"gene"]))
CPM_rna_DEG <- CPM_rna_new %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% DEG)
logCPM <- log2(CPM_rna_DEG + 1)

# split rows by determined number of clusters
km_res <- niceKmeans(logCPM, 14)
split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
                        rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
                        rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
                        rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
                        rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
                        rep(6,km_res$breaks[6]-km_res$breaks[5]),
                        rep(7,km_res$breaks[7]-km_res$breaks[6]),
                        rep(8,km_res$breaks[8]-km_res$breaks[7]),
                        rep(9,km_res$breaks[9]-km_res$breaks[8]),
                        rep(10,km_res$breaks[10]-km_res$breaks[9]),
                        rep(11,km_res$breaks[11]-km_res$breaks[10]),
                        rep(12,km_res$breaks[12]-km_res$breaks[11]),
                        rep(13,km_res$breaks[13]-km_res$breaks[12]),
                        rep(14,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[13]))
km_res.rna <- km_res
split_instructions.rna <- split_instructions

# 4. load genes of interest
g <- data.table::fread("~/Downloads/nl/human/skin/eQTLs/literature/KEGG/GSEA_hallmark-genes-upregulated-in-response-to-IFNG.txt",header=F)$V1
zlogCPM.heatmap <- km_res.rna$clustered[,1:ncol(CPM_rna_DEG)]
zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene <- zlogCPM.heatmap %>% dplyr::filter(rownames(.) %in% g)
row_anno_index <- which(rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %in% rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap_with_gene))
row_anno_label <- rownames(zlogCPM.heatmap)[row_anno_index]

# 5. plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM.heatmap) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")),
  show_legend = c(TRUE,TRUE))

row_ha = rowAnnotation(
  foo = anno_mark(at = row_anno_index, 
                  labels = row_anno_label,
                  which="row",
                  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                  padding=unit(0.5,"mm")))

pdf(paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_14kmm-hc_03282023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.pdf"),width=24,height=30)
heatmap.rna <- draw(Heatmap(zlogCPM.heatmap, 
                            name = "z-score log2CPM",
                            top_annotation = column_ha,
                            right_annotation = row_ha,
                            column_title = "DE genes in 3 celltypes, control vs IGNg stimulated, known IFNg inducible genes labeled",
                            cluster_columns = FALSE,
                            cluster_rows = FALSE,
                            column_split = c(rep(1,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(2,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(3,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("PBS_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(4,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_KRT",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])), 
                                             rep(5,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_MEL",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))])),
                                             rep(6,length(colnames(CPM_rna_DEG)[grepl("IFN_FRB",colnames(CPM_rna_DEG))]))),
                            row_split = split_instructions.rna, 
                            show_row_names = FALSE,
                            row_title_rot = 0,
                            column_names_rot = 45,
                            row_gap = unit(0, "mm"),
                            border = TRUE,
                            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
                            column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
                            row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")))
dev.off()
cluster1_genes = rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==1)]

save.image(file=paste0(Dir,"/heatmap_RNA/myEnvironment_heatmap_RNAseq_DEgenes_7kmm-hc_02292023_padj0.05_log2FC1.5_avgCPM10.RData"))
```
## PLOT
```{r plot}
gene <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==3)]
p1 <- draw_rna_heatmap(gene)
p2 <- draw_atac_promoter_heatmap(gene)
p3 <- draw_atac_enhancer_heatmap(gene)
p4 <- draw_chip_promoter_heatmap(gene)
p5 <- draw_chip_enhancer_heatmap(gene)

p.promoter <- p2 %v% p4
p.enhancer <- p3 %v% p5

grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(x = 0, width = 0.5, just = "left"))
grid.rect(gp = gpar(fill = "#FF000020"))
draw(p1, newpage = FALSE)
popViewport()

pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.5, y = 1, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, just = c("left", "top")))
grid.rect(gp = gpar(fill = "#00FF0020"))
draw(p.promoter, newpage = FALSE)
popViewport()

pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.5, y = 0.5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, just = c("left", "top")))
grid.rect(gp = gpar(fill = "#0000FF20"))
draw(p.enhancer, newpage = FALSE)
popViewport()
```
# For genes that are up/down-regulated in all 3cts, are their enhancers shared across celltypes?
## For commonly regulated genes, check if their enhancers are shared across celltypes in ATACseq
```{r gene-enhancer-sharing-atac}
# to view which genes belong to clsuter of (commonly up-regulated genes)
commonly_induced_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==4)]
gene <- commonly_induced_genes[2]
make_paired_plot(gene,CPM_rna_DEG[gene,])

# get the enhancers of these genes
enhancer_of_gene_group1 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% commonly_induced_genes) %>% arrange(gene) %>% pull(enhancer) %>% unique

# prepare data to plot the ATACseq heatmap of the enhancers
logCPM <- log2(CPM_atac_DEG_enhancer[enhancer_of_gene_group1,] + 1)
zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(log2(CPM_atac_DEG_enhancer[enhancer_of_gene_group1,] + 1))))

# # # cluster the enhancers
# km_res <- niceKmeans(logCPM, 7)
# split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]),
#                         rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
#                         rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
#                         rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
#                         rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
#                         rep(6,km_res$breaks[6]-km_res$breaks[5]),
#                         rep(7,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[6]))
# km_res.atac.enhancer <- km_res
# split_instructions.atac.enhancer <- split_instructions

# plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))

heatmap.atac.enhancer <- Heatmap(zlogCPM, 
                                 name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                 row_km = 7,
                                 top_annotation = column_ha,
                                 column_title = "ATACseq heatmap of enhancers of commonly induced genes",
                                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                 cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                 column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                 show_row_names = FALSE,
                                 row_title_rot = 0,
                                 column_names_rot = 45,
                                 row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                 border = FALSE,
                                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                 column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                 row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
ht = draw(heatmap.atac.enhancer); enhancer_clusters = row_order(ht) # this ensures the cluster info doesn't change every time I execute this line of code.

# pick the commonly open enhancers of commonly induced genes
enhancers_shared <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(row_order(ht)$`5`)]
enhancers_cts <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`2`,row_order(ht)$`4`,row_order(ht)$`7`))]
enhancers_paired <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`1`,row_order(ht)$`3`,row_order(ht)$`6`))]

df1 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(enhancer %in% enhancers_shared) %>% mutate(pattern="shared")
df2 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(enhancer %in% enhancers_cts) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")
df3 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(enhancer %in% enhancers_paired) %>% mutate(pattern="paired")
df <- rbind(df1,df2,df3)

ggplot(df , aes(x=pattern, y=distance)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1)
```
```{r gene-promoter-sharing-atac}
# to view which genes belong to clsuter of (commonly up-regulated genes)
commonly_induced_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==6)]

# get the enhancers of these genes
promoter_of_gene_group1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% commonly_induced_genes) %>% arrange(gene) %>% pull(promoter) %>% unique

# prepare data to plot the ATACseq heatmap of the enhancers
zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(log2(CPM_atac_DEG_promoter[promoter_of_gene_group1,] + 1))))

# plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))

heatmap.atac.promoter <- Heatmap(zlogCPM, 
                                 name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                 row_km = 7,
                                 top_annotation = column_ha,
                                 column_title = "ATACseq heatmap of promoters of commonly induced genes",
                                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                 cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                 column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                 show_row_names = FALSE,
                                 row_title_rot = 0,
                                 column_names_rot = 45,
                                 row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                 border = FALSE,
                                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                 column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                 row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
ht = draw(heatmap.atac.promoter); promoter_clusters = row_order(ht) # this ensures the cluster info doesn't change every time I execute this line of code.

# plot the distance of common promoters and cts promoters
# pick the commonly open enhancers of commonly induced genes
promoters_shared <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`3`))]
promoters_cts <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`4`,row_order(ht)$`6`))]

df1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(promoter %in% promoters_shared) %>% mutate(pattern="shared")
df2 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(promoter %in% promoters_cts) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")
df <- rbind(df1,df2)

ggplot(df , aes(x=pattern, y=distance)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1)

# Could the cell-type specific promoters come from genes with multiple promoters?
genes_of_df1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% df1$gene) %>% arrange(gene,promoter) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","promoter")) %>% 
  group_by(gene) %>% mutate(count = n()) %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","count")) %>%
  distinct(gene,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% mutate(pattern="common")
genes_of_df2 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% df2$gene) %>% arrange(gene,promoter) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","promoter")) %>% 
  group_by(gene) %>% mutate(count = n()) %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","count")) %>%
  distinct(gene,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")

df <- rbind(genes_of_df1, genes_of_df2)

get_box_stats <- function(y, upper_limit = max(df$count) * 1.15) {
  return(data.frame(
    y = 0.95 * upper_limit,
    label = paste(
      "Count =", length(y), "\n",
      "Mean =", round(mean(y), 2), "\n",
      "Median =", round(median(y), 2), "\n"
    )
  ))
}
ggplot(df, aes(x=pattern, y=count)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = get_box_stats, geom="text", hjust=0.5, vjust=0.8)
```
## For commonly regulated genes, check if their enhancers are shared across celltypes in ChIPseq
```{r gene-enhancer-sharing-chip}
# to view which genes belong to clsuter of (commonly up-regulated genes)
commonly_induced_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==6)]

# get the enhancers of these genes
enhancer_of_gene_group1 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% commonly_induced_genes) %>% arrange(gene) %>% pull(enhancer) %>% unique

# prepare data to plot the ATACseq heatmap of the enhancers
zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(log2(CPM_chip_DEG_enhancer[enhancer_of_gene_group1,] + 1))))

# # cluster the enhancers
# km_res <- niceKmeans(zlogCPM, 7)
# split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
#                         rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
#                         rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
#                         rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
#                         rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
#                         rep(6,km_res$breaks[6]-km_res$breaks[5]),
#                         rep(7,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[6]))
# km_res.chip.enhancer <- km_res
# split_instructions.chip.enhancer <- split_instructions

# plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))

heatmap.chip.enhancer <- Heatmap(zlogCPM, 
                                 name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                 row_km = 7,
                                 top_annotation = column_ha,
                                 column_title = "ChIPseq heatmap of enhancers of commonly induced genes",
                                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                 cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                 column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                 show_row_names = FALSE,
                                 row_title_rot = 0,
                                 column_names_rot = 45,
                                 row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                 border = FALSE,
                                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                 column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                 row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
ht = draw(heatmap.chip.enhancer); enhancer_clusters = row_order(ht) # this ensures the cluster info doesn't change every time I execute this line of code.

# pick the commonly open enhancers of commonly induced genes
enhancers_shared <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(row_order(ht)$`5`)]
enhancers_cts <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`2`,row_order(ht)$`4`,row_order(ht)$`7`))]
enhancers_paired <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`1`,row_order(ht)$`3`,row_order(ht)$`6`))]

df1 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(enhancer %in% enhancers_shared) %>% mutate(pattern="shared")
df2 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(enhancer %in% enhancers_cts) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")
df3 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(enhancer %in% enhancers_paired) %>% mutate(pattern="paired")
df <- rbind(df1,df2,df3)

ggplot(df , aes(x=pattern, y=distance)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1)
```
```{r gene-promoter-sharing-chip}
# to view which genes belong to clsuter of (commonly up-regulated genes)
commonly_induced_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==6)]

# get the enhancers of these genes
promoter_of_gene_group1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% commonly_induced_genes) %>% arrange(gene) %>% pull(promoter) %>% unique

# prepare data to plot the ChIPseq heatmap of the enhancers
zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(log2(CPM_chip_DEG_promoter[promoter_of_gene_group1,] + 1))))

# plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))

heatmap.chip.promoter <- Heatmap(zlogCPM, 
                                 name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                 row_km = 7,
                                 top_annotation = column_ha,
                                 column_title = "ChIPseq heatmap of promoters of commonly induced genes",
                                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                 cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                 column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                 show_row_names = FALSE,
                                 row_title_rot = 0,
                                 column_names_rot = 45,
                                 row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                 border = FALSE,
                                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                 column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                 row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
ht = draw(heatmap.chip.promoter); promoter_clusters = row_order(ht) # this ensures the cluster info doesn't change every time I execute this line of code.

# plot the distance of common promoters and cts promoters
# pick the commonly open enhancers of commonly induced genes
promoters_shared <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`3`))]
promoters_cts <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`4`,row_order(ht)$`6`))]

df1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(promoter %in% promoters_shared) %>% mutate(pattern="shared")
df2 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(promoter %in% promoters_cts) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")
df <- rbind(df1,df2)

ggplot(df , aes(x=pattern, y=distance)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1)

# Could the cell-type specific promoters come from genes with multiple promoters?
genes_of_df1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% df1$gene) %>% arrange(gene,promoter) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","promoter")) %>% 
  group_by(gene) %>% mutate(count = n()) %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","count")) %>%
  distinct(gene,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% mutate(pattern="common")
genes_of_df2 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% df2$gene) %>% arrange(gene,promoter) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","promoter")) %>% 
  group_by(gene) %>% mutate(count = n()) %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","count")) %>%
  distinct(gene,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")

df <- rbind(genes_of_df1, genes_of_df2)

get_box_stats <- function(y, upper_limit = max(df$count) * 1.15) {
  return(data.frame(
    y = 0.95 * upper_limit,
    label = paste(
      "Count =", length(y), "\n",
      "Mean =", round(mean(y), 2), "\n",
      "Median =", round(median(y), 2), "\n"
    )
  ))
}
ggplot(df, aes(x=pattern, y=count)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = get_box_stats, geom="text", hjust=0.5, vjust=0.8)
```
## For cell-type-specificly expressed genes, check if their enhancers are unique across celltypes in ATACseq
```{r cts-gene-enhancer-sharing-atac}
# to view which genes belong to clsuter of (cts-regulated genes)
these_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==4 | split_instructions.rna==6)]
gene <- these_genes[200]
make_paired_plot(gene,CPM_rna_DEG[gene,])

# get the enhancers of these genes
enhancer_of_gene_group1 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% these_genes) %>% arrange(gene) %>% pull(enhancer) %>% unique

# prepare data to plot the ATACseq heatmap of the enhancers
zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(log2(CPM_atac_DEG_enhancer[enhancer_of_gene_group1,] + 1))))

# # cluster the enhancers
# km_res <- niceKmeans(zlogCPM, 7)
# split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
#                         rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
#                         rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
#                         rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
#                         rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
#                         rep(6,km_res$breaks[6]-km_res$breaks[5]),
#                         rep(7,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[6]))
# km_res.atac.enhancer <- km_res
# split_instructions.atac.enhancer <- split_instructions

# plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))

heatmap.atac.enhancer <- Heatmap(zlogCPM, 
                                 name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                 row_km = 7,
                                 top_annotation = column_ha,
                                 column_title = "ATACseq heatmap of enhancers of cell-type-spcificly induced genes",
                                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                 cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                 column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                 show_row_names = FALSE,
                                 row_title_rot = 0,
                                 column_names_rot = 45,
                                 row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                 border = FALSE,
                                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                 column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                 row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
ht = draw(heatmap.atac.enhancer); enhancer_clusters = row_order(ht) # this ensures the cluster info doesn't change every time I execute this line of code.
```
```{r gene-promoter-sharing-atac}
# to view which genes belong to clsuter of (commonly up-regulated genes)
these_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==4 | split_instructions.rna==6)]

# get the enhancers of these genes
promoter_of_gene_group1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% these_genes) %>% arrange(gene) %>% pull(promoter) %>% unique

# prepare data to plot the atacseq heatmap of the enhancers
zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(log2(CPM_atac_DEG_promoter[promoter_of_gene_group1,] + 1))))

# plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))

heatmap.atac.promoter <- Heatmap(zlogCPM, 
                                 name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                 row_km = 7,
                                 top_annotation = column_ha,
                                 column_title = "atacseq heatmap of promoters of cell-type-specificly induced genes",
                                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                 cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                 column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                 show_row_names = FALSE,
                                 row_title_rot = 0,
                                 column_names_rot = 45,
                                 row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                 border = FALSE,
                                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                 column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                 row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
ht = draw(heatmap.atac.promoter); promoter_clusters = row_order(ht) # this ensures the cluster info doesn't change every time I execute this line of code.

# plot the distance of common promoters and cts promoters
# pick the commonly open enhancers of commonly induced genes
promoters_shared <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`3`))]
promoters_cts <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`4`,row_order(ht)$`6`))]

df1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(promoter %in% promoters_shared) %>% mutate(pattern="shared")
df2 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(promoter %in% promoters_cts) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")
df <- rbind(df1,df2)

ggplot(df , aes(x=pattern, y=distance)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1)

# Could the cell-type specific promoters come from genes with multiple promoters?
genes_of_df1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% df1$gene) %>% arrange(gene,promoter) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","promoter")) %>% 
  group_by(gene) %>% mutate(count = n()) %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","count")) %>%
  distinct(gene,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% mutate(pattern="common")
genes_of_df2 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% df2$gene) %>% arrange(gene,promoter) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","promoter")) %>% 
  group_by(gene) %>% mutate(count = n()) %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","count")) %>%
  distinct(gene,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")

df <- rbind(genes_of_df1, genes_of_df2)

get_box_stats <- function(y, upper_limit = max(df$count) * 1.15) {
  return(data.frame(
    y = 0.95 * upper_limit,
    label = paste(
      "Count =", length(y), "\n",
      "Mean =", round(mean(y), 2), "\n",
      "Median =", round(median(y), 2), "\n"
    )
  ))
}
ggplot(df, aes(x=pattern, y=count)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = get_box_stats, geom="text", hjust=0.5, vjust=0.8)
```
## For cell-type-specificly expressed genes, check if their enhancers are unique across celltypes in ChIPseq
```{r cts-gene-enhancer-sharing-chip}
# to view which genes belong to clsuter of (cts-regulated genes)
these_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==4 | split_instructions.rna==6)]

# get the enhancers of these genes
enhancer_of_gene_group1 <- link_gene_enhancer %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% these_genes) %>% arrange(gene) %>% pull(enhancer) %>% unique

# prepare data to plot the ATACseq heatmap of the enhancers
zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(log2(CPM_chip_DEG_enhancer[enhancer_of_gene_group1,] + 1))))

# # cluster the enhancers
# km_res <- niceKmeans(zlogCPM, 7)
# split_instructions <- c(rep(1,km_res$breaks[1]), 
#                         rep(2,km_res$breaks[2]-km_res$breaks[1]),
#                         rep(3,km_res$breaks[3]-km_res$breaks[2]),
#                         rep(4,km_res$breaks[4]-km_res$breaks[3]),
#                         rep(5,km_res$breaks[5]-km_res$breaks[4]),
#                         rep(6,km_res$breaks[6]-km_res$breaks[5]),
#                         rep(7,nrow(km_res$clustered)-km_res$breaks[6]))
# km_res.chip.enhancer <- km_res
# split_instructions.chip.enhancer <- split_instructions

# plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))

heatmap.chip.enhancer <- Heatmap(zlogCPM, 
                                 name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                 row_km = 7,
                                 top_annotation = column_ha,
                                 column_title = "ChIPseq heatmap of enhancers of cell-type-spcificly induced genes",
                                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                 cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                 column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                 show_row_names = FALSE,
                                 row_title_rot = 0,
                                 column_names_rot = 45,
                                 row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                 border = FALSE,
                                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                 column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                 row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
ht = draw(heatmap.chip.enhancer); enhancer_clusters = row_order(ht) # this ensures the cluster info doesn't change every time I execute this line of code.
```
```{r gene-promoter-sharing-chip}
# to view which genes belong to clsuter of (commonly up-regulated genes)
these_genes <- rownames(km_res.rna$clustered)[which(split_instructions.rna==4 | split_instructions.rna==6)]

# get the enhancers of these genes
promoter_of_gene_group1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% these_genes) %>% arrange(gene) %>% pull(promoter) %>% unique

# prepare data to plot the ChIPseq heatmap of the enhancers
zlogCPM <- t(scale(t(log2(CPM_chip_DEG_promoter[promoter_of_gene_group1,] + 1))))

# plot heatmap
column_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  condition = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[3]) %>% unlist(),
  celltype = colnames(zlogCPM) %>% 
    lapply( . , function(x) unlist(strsplit(x , "_", ))[2]) %>% unlist(),
  col = list(condition = c("PBS" = "black", "IFN" = "#FA8072"),
             celltype = c("KRT" = "#DAF7A6", "MEL" = "#964B00", "FRB" = "#CCCCFF")))

heatmap.chip.promoter <- Heatmap(zlogCPM, 
                                 name = "z-score log2CPM",
                                 row_km = 7,
                                 top_annotation = column_ha,
                                 column_title = "ChIPseq heatmap of promoters of cell-type-specificly induced genes",
                                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                 cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                 column_split = c(rep(1,9), rep(2,9)),
                                 show_row_names = FALSE,
                                 row_title_rot = 0,
                                 column_names_rot = 45,
                                 row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                 border = FALSE,
                                 column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
                                 column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"),
                                 row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5, fontface = "bold"))
ht = draw(heatmap.chip.promoter); promoter_clusters = row_order(ht) # this ensures the cluster info doesn't change every time I execute this line of code.

# plot the distance of common promoters and cts promoters
# pick the commonly open enhancers of commonly induced genes
promoters_shared <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`3`))]
promoters_cts <- rownames(zlogCPM)[sort(c(row_order(ht)$`4`,row_order(ht)$`6`))]

df1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(promoter %in% promoters_shared) %>% mutate(pattern="shared")
df2 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(promoter %in% promoters_cts) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")
df <- rbind(df1,df2)

ggplot(df , aes(x=pattern, y=distance)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1)

# Could the cell-type specific promoters come from genes with multiple promoters?
genes_of_df1 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% df1$gene) %>% arrange(gene,promoter) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","promoter")) %>% 
  group_by(gene) %>% mutate(count = n()) %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","count")) %>%
  distinct(gene,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% mutate(pattern="common")
genes_of_df2 <- link_gene_promoter %>% dplyr::filter(gene %in% df2$gene) %>% arrange(gene,promoter) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(celltype=="KRT") %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","promoter")) %>% 
  group_by(gene) %>% mutate(count = n()) %>% dplyr::select(c("gene","count")) %>%
  distinct(gene,.keep_all=TRUE) %>% mutate(pattern="cts")

df <- rbind(genes_of_df1, genes_of_df2)

get_box_stats <- function(y, upper_limit = max(df$count) * 1.15) {
  return(data.frame(
    y = 0.95 * upper_limit,
    label = paste(
      "Count =", length(y), "\n",
      "Mean =", round(mean(y), 2), "\n",
      "Median =", round(median(y), 2), "\n"
    )
  ))
}
ggplot(df, aes(x=pattern, y=count)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = get_box_stats, geom="text", hjust=0.5, vjust=0.8)
```
